title: Too many tools. Too much admin. Not enough time.
subtitle: Sound familiar?
text: Most small businesses are buried in disconnected software, manual workflows, and operational chaos.

title: Moxi Labs builds practical AI systems for small business.
subtitle: Automation. Workflows. Operational Intelligence.
text: We simplify operations, connect systems, and help businesses operate more independently with AI.

title: Built in the desert. For businesses like yours.
subtitle: Palm Springs + Coachella Valley
text: We help local businesses use AI to simplify operations, reduce SaaS dependency, and operate more independently.

title: Join us for coffee.
subtitle: Weekly AI + Business Roundtable
text: Every Thursday morning at Ernest Coffee on South Palm Canyon. No sales pitch. No presentations. Just practical conversations about AI, automation, operations, and what’s actually working for local businesses.
